RuleSet.Name: src/schemapubobj/ISchemaPubSchemaObj.java

GenFile.Name: fileISchemaPubSchemaObjJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pubobj

RuleSet.GenRule: public I$SchemaName$PubSchema get$SchemaName$PubBackingStore(); public void set$SchemaName$PubBackingStore(I$SchemaName$PubSchema $lower SchemaName$PubBackingStore);

/** * Release any prepared statements acquired by this connection. *

* Resets the prepared statements so they can acquire the new value of * setDbSchemaName(). */ void releasePreparedStatements();
